name: lysergic
short_description: Directory scanning tool for analyzing file systems with hashing, metadata extraction, and optional media tag support.
long_description: Lysergic is a Python directory scanning utility that recursively analyzes file systems and generates structured reports about files. It computes cryptographic hashes (MD5, SHA1, SHA256) for file integrity verification, extracts filesystem metadata including permissions and timestamps, and provides optional integration with Magika for AI-powered file type detection. The tool supports embedded media metadata extraction from audio, video, and ebook files through pluggable extractors (Mutagen for audio/MP4, pymediainfo for video, ebooklib for EPUB). It offers multi-threaded processing for improved performance, gzip compression for output, and time estimation for large directory trees. Can be used as a command-line tool (lsd command) or as a Python library.

modules.description: Core LSD class implementing directory scanning with file hashing, metadata extraction, progress tracking, and multi-threaded processing.
Package initialization exporting LSD class and defining program metadata (__version__, __program__).
Pluggable metadata extraction system with strategies for audio (mutagen), video (pymediainfo), and ebook (ebooklib) files.
Comprehensive unit tests covering file properties extraction, hashing, metadata inclusion, threading, and directory processing.
